expect.mustNotMatch: (let me look|i'?ll find|one moment|hold on|right away)

name: user pivots gender mid-conversation
messages: Looking for men's running shoes.
Actually, do you have these for my wife?

messages: My wife is a runner. Recommend an orthotic.
